resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def maximumEvenSplit(self, finalSum: int) -> List[int]:
        if finalSum % 2:
            return []
        res, cur, s = [], 2, 0
        while s + cur <= finalSum:
            res.append(cur)
            s += cur
            cur += 2
        if s < finalSum:
            res[-1] += finalSum - s
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(√finalSum)
space complexity: O(√finalSum)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Greedy construction of the longest strictly increasing sequence of even numbers starting from 2; the last term absorbs any remainder to keep uniqueness and exact sum.
